label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatogonia > undifferentiated spermatogonia
text: Cells expressing nanos2 and ddx4 are consistent with undifferentiated spermatogonia.
notes: marker list is starter-level and pending curation

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatogonia > differentiating spermatogonia
text: Cells expressing dmrt1 and dazl are consistent with differentiating spermatogonia.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > germ cell > spermatocyte > pachytene
text: Cells expressing sycp3 and spo11 are consistent with pachytene spermatocytes.

label_hierarchical: testis cell > somatic cell > Sertoli cell
text: Cells expressing sox9a and amh are consistent with Sertoli cells.
Cells expressing lcp1 and ptprc are consistent with broad fish immune cells.
